candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line above EBIT, but it is a total D&A amount and not specifically identified as COGS-related relative to the selected COGS bucket 'Use of Materials and Supplies'. Adding it to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting across operating buckets.
Operating D&A component shown separately, but not tagged to cost of sales / cost of revenues. Cannot reliably attribute to the selected COGS bucket.
Operating D&A component shown separately, but not labelled as COGS / COR-related. Attribution to the selected COGS bucket is unclear.
Minor operating D&A component, but not bucket-specific and therefore not reliably assignable to COGS.

variables.notes: The selected COGS row is a direct materials bucket. The excerpt shows only generic operating D&A rows, with no explicit indication of which portion belongs to COGS. To avoid misclassification and double counting, no COGS-specific D&A row is added.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows, but it appears to be a company-wide total rather than SG&A-specific D&A. Using it for XSGA_DA would likely over-assign COGS-related D&A as well.
Separate operating D&A component, but not labelled as SG&A / admin / selling / R&D-related. Could be part of the total D&A line rather than an XSGA-specific amount.
Separate operating D&A component, but not identified as SG&A-specific; likely part of the broader D&A total.
Residual D&A component with no SG&A-specific tag, so not safe to add to XSGA separately.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket excludes D&A by construction, and a separate operating D&A summary exists. However, the statement does not split D&A between COGS and SG&A, and no explicit SG&A-only D&A row is visible. Conservative treatment is to add nothing automatically and flag for manual review.
